name: hcportal_getNewsflashReaders
description: Returns all users who have interacted with a specific newsflash (dismissed or snoozed), ordered by UpdatedAt DESC. Only users who have responded at least once are included — users who have never seen or responded to the newsflash are not included. Works on soft-deleted newsflashes so admins can inspect the reader list after deletion.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: device ID. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with NULL callerParamString.

parameters.name: newsflashId
parameters.description: Required: the newsflash to query. Validated for NULL before auth. Must exist (including soft-deleted).

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on NULL @newsflashId, auth failure, newsflash not found, or runtime error.

rowsets.name: ReaderList
rowsets.description: Zero or more rows, one per user who has interacted with this newsflash, ordered by UpdatedAt DESC.

columns.name: isDismissed
columns.description: 1 = user permanently dismissed; 0 = user snoozed (Read Later)

columns.name: nextShowDate
columns.description: Date from which the newsflash will be shown again after a snooze. NULL when isDismissed=1.

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: UTC timestamp of the last interaction

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
